name: 双持贝瑞塔 | 灾难
descriptionEn: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. It has been custom painted with a high tech black, white, and red design. Always follow manufacturer guidelines for safe use
descriptionZh: 两把具有大弹匣的贝瑞塔同时开火会降低精准度，并增加换弹时间。不过你得往好处想，这不，别人只有一把枪，而你可以同时用两把贝瑞塔射个痛快。 这把武器采用高科技质感的黑、白、红三色花纹定制。 始终遵守制造商的安全使用指南
